title: Static methods and typedefs in classes
body:
This PR provides support for static methods, as well as `typedef`s contained within classes.

I updated some of the regression tests and added a new one for this functionality.

There is (at least) one bug: if we have a class defined within a module, Verilator is unable to find a static method from that class. I don't know how to fix it, perhaps someone has some suggestions.
